title: Was ist der Unterschied zwischen "Heimat" und "Zuhaus" ?
content: "Heimat" and "Zuhause" means basically "home" but although there is a difference: "Heimat" is often used to describe the "homeland" or "country" (something bigger than a usual flat) while "Zuhause" is used for flats, small houses, cribs etc. and can also mean "at home", e. g.
